📥 Bulk Import Accounts
Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file — auto-calculates KPIs for each row
📄
Click or drag & drop your file here
Supports .xlsx, .xls, .csv — up to 50,000 rows
💡 Expected Column Names (flexible matching)
● Account Name / name ● Product (matched by name) ● Segment (optional) ● Volume Base / volume ● Activations / new activations ● Churn / churn count ● Revenue / total revenue
Net Activations, Retention %, Churn Rate % and ARPU are auto-calculated — no need to include them.
